summary: Full testing of CROUS WhatsApp Bot Dashboard - backend API and frontend UI. All 14 backend tests pass. All frontend flows (CRUD for auto-replies, banned words, commands, settings, navigation, filters) working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Minor: data-testid='notification' toast not shown after save; instead the save button itself changes text to 'Sauvegardé !' which is visible in UI. Functionally working.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') - should use lifespan context manager (FastAPI 0.93+), but not breaking

AutoReplyUpdate: uses `if v is not None` which means active=False can't be updated to False if it was never set (it would skip False values). However active=False works because it IS not None. Actually fine.
Settings PUT endpoint accepts full BotSettings - no partial update support, but acceptable for this use case

success_rate.frontend: 95% (save notification testid mismatch is minor, functionality confirmed via screenshot)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Overview stats (8 auto-replies, 48 banned words, 17 commands), sidebar navigation (nav-overview/autoreplies/banned/commands/settings), Auto-Replies CRUD + toggle, Banned Words CRUD with category tabs, Commands CRUD + category filters (IA/Fun/Jeux/Utile), Settings save with prefix change. Backend 100% pass. Nav data-testid uses nav-{id} pattern (ids: overview, autoreplies, banned, commands, settings).
